name: 7L + BigramHash Projection + Batch Scaling + Systematic HyperOpt (1xH100)
blurb: 7 layers, 4x MLP (relu^2), BigramHash 8192 with dim=128 projection. Key insight: batch size scaling (131K tokens) on H100 trades steps for quality per step. Systematic LR/WD scaling with step count across 111 experiments. 1x H100 SXM, 10min. Artifact: 15.5MB.
author: CrimsonSithira
